title: Mateo Glimmerton

summary: Founder of Kelpforge.

Mateo Glimmerton is the founder of Kelpforge. Mateo shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

---
title: Kelpforge
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Mateo Glimmerton.
---

Kelpforge is a seed-stage company. Founded by Mateo Glimmerton. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Kelpforge call with Mateo Glimmerton.
Mateo said Kelpforge hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
I committed to sending Mateo the diligence checklist by Friday.
